summary: v2.22 30-item polish sprint end-to-end test. Backend: 6/6 v2.22 tests PASS (DELETE /api/tasks/completed + DELETE /api/routines/completed with sr_no compaction; POST /api/tasks/reorder yields sr_no=1..N; strict 2+2+2 first-login seed verified Rahul/Amit + Uptime/Hydrate & Tea + Zomato/Brinda loan-given). Frontend (Karan account): visually verified via screenshot — 'FRIDAY, MAY 15, 2026 · 8:13 PM' date-time line renders and matches spec, 7 quick-nav cards (Tasks/Routines/Cash Flow/Notes/Reminders/Reports/Settings), logout-btn is sibling of user name in same flex row (AppShell.jsx 188-206), sidebar-collapse-toggle inline with 4 dock buttons (AppShell.jsx 178-186), Notes shows only [all, vault] tabs with no search bar, CashFlow shows 'Import' button (not Upload) and subtitle 'Unified ledger.' (lowercase L) and placeholder 'e.g. #Company Paid Brinda loan at 9% pa for 50000 rupees', CATEGORIES options include {Income, Expense, Asset, Liability, Loan Given, Loan Taken} capitalised, Tasks placeholder 'e.g. #Work Call Brinda for revising the invoice', news widget select+RSS toggle both carry font-sans class. P3.17 frontend bulk-delete buttons (tasks-bulk-delete-completed / routines-bulk-delete-completed) confirmed in source (Tasks.jsx, Routines.jsx) with conditional-render when any Done/Completed row exists. Regression v2.21: 29/31 pytest pass (the 2 fails are NOT regressions — main agent tightened /digest/settings Pydantic to ge=0/le=23 per v2.20 review comment, so the old 'clamp 50→23' tests now correctly 422; spec-compliant improvement). v2.20/2.19 regression suites green.

minor.issue: Routine status accepts only Active|Paused via POST but DELETE /api/routines/completed filters status in ['Done','Completed']. Routines must be transitioned to Done/Completed via PATCH (which uses Dict[str,Any]) — frontend Routines.jsx does this correctly. Consider widening the Literal to Active|Paused|Done|Completed for schema/behaviour consistency.

ui_bugs.issue: Visually renders correctly ('FRIDAY, MAY 15, 2026 · 8:13 PM') but the element lacks data-testid='dashboard-datetime' — makes future automated assertions harder.

Select shows the spec'd 6 capitalised categories plus legacy lowercase duplicates ('liability', 'expense') that came from existing user transactions. Code (CATEGORIES const) is correct; DB has legacy rows whose category was stored lowercase. Recommend a one-shot normalisation (UPDATE transactions SET category = INITCAP(category) WHERE category IN ('expense','liability','income','asset')).
ui_bugs.selector: select with Loan Given option on /cashflow

issues: Uses browser-native HTML5 date input ('mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder visible) instead of a styled shadcn calendar — inconsistent with the gold-dark theme. Pre-existing.

action_items: (LOW) Add data-testid='dashboard-datetime' to the dashboard date-time line for testability.
(LOW) Widen RoutineIn.status Literal to include Done|Completed so POST aligns with the DELETE /routines/completed filter and PATCH behaviour.
(LOW) Normalise existing cashflow transactions whose `category` is stored lowercase (legacy rows surface as duplicates in the CATEGORIES dropdown).
(LOW) Update v2.21 test_clamps_high_hour / test_clamps_negative_hour to expect 422 (Pydantic ge/le validation now rejects out-of-range hours).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py 622-629 + 773-780: bulk-delete endpoints correctly call _compact_sr after delete_many so sr_no is compacted to 1..N; both return {deleted: N}. Solid.
server.py 888-899 (/reorder): sets both order_index and sr_no during reorder — frontend display column stays in sync. Good.

server.py 3133-3190 (_seed_strict_starter): inserts exactly 2 tasks + 2 routines + 2 transactions with deterministic sr_no=1,2 and correct categories ('expense' for Zomato, 'loan_given' for Brinda). One concern: the seed stores Zomato category as lowercase 'expense' — this is what feeds the legacy-lowercase entries flagged above. Recommend storing 'Expense' / 'Loan Given' (capitalised) to match CATEGORIES const in CashFlow.jsx.
AppShell.jsx 178-206: logout-btn is sibling of the user name <div> inside the same flex row (P1.2 ✓); collapse-toggle is the 5th button in the dock-flex row (P4.28 ✓).
Tasks.jsx & Routines.jsx bulk-delete-completed buttons are conditional on routines.some(r => r.status === 'Done' || r.status === 'Completed') — correctly hidden when no Done/Completed rows exist.

Settings.jsx Telegram <details>/<summary> guide should also be visible when telegram IS linked, OR explicitly documented as 'first-time only'. Currently invisible for Karan because already linked — verify this matches the spec intent of P3.21.

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 v2.22 — bulk-delete-completed tasks+routines with sr_no compaction, reorder->1..N, strict 2+2+2 seed shape, smoke). Regression: 29/31 v2.21 (2 pre-existing tests need expectation updates after Pydantic tightening — not a v2.22 regression).
success_rate.frontend: ~90%. Visually confirmed P1.1/P1.2/P1.3/P1.4/P1.5/P1.6 placeholder/P3.16/P2.13/P3.22/P4.25/P4.26/P4.28/P4.29/P4.30. P2.10/P2.12/P2.14/P3.17/P4.27 couldn't be auto-verified because Karan's user had no active task rows during scan; source-code inspection confirms grid-cols-3 + w-[84px] + 130px status grid + line-through opacity-55 + tasks/routines-bulk-delete-completed testids are all in place.

seed_data_creation: Created throwaway signup user TEST_v222_seed_*@mindmatters.local during the strict-seed test (one row in users; harmless). Created 4 'TEST_v222ord_*' tasks during the reorder test then deleted them. Created 3 'TEST_v222_*' tasks and 3 'TEST_v222r_*' routines for bulk-delete-completed tests; the 2 Done/Completed in each were bulk-deleted by the endpoint under test, the surviving probe rows were cleaned up. May have changed sr_no order of Karan's existing tasks (reverse-then-restore was NOT performed) — test_v222 includes a final reorder step but does not restore original ordering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.22 ships green on backend (DELETE /tasks/completed + /routines/completed + reorder sr_no 1..N + strict 2+2+2 first-login seed all verified). Visual UI items confirmed via dashboard screenshot. The 8 'failed' frontend assertions in test logs are scope-detection artefacts (no active Done rows present for Karan during scan), NOT regressions — source code grep + earlier-iteration screenshots confirm those classes & testids are in place. Two minor data-hygiene findings worth surfacing to main agent: (1) seed stores 'expense'/'loan_given' lowercase but CashFlow CATEGORIES dropdown expects capitalised — causes duplicate dropdown entries for users with seed data; (2) RoutineIn.status Pydantic Literal doesn't include Done|Completed but DELETE /routines/completed filters those. Telegram <details> P3.21: only visible when NOT linked; Karan is linked so hidden — verify this is per-spec or extend visibility.
rca of the issue: No bug requiring root-cause. Only nuance: v2.21 regression had 2 'failed' tests but those are NOT v2.22-introduced — main agent had previously tightened /digest/settings to use Pydantic Field(ge=0, le=23) per v2.20 code review feedback, which correctly rejects out-of-range hour values with 422; the old clamp tests need expectations updated to assert 422 instead of 200+clamped value.
